title: Al-Rashid's Killing of Ibrahim b. 'Uthman b. Nahik
description: It has been mentioned from $ilib al-A`ma, who lived in proximity to Ibrahim b. 'Uthmin, that he said: Ibrahim b. `Uthman used often to mention Ja`far b. Yaitya and the Barmakis, and would weep profusely out of grief over them and love for them, to an extent that he passed beyond the stage of weeping for them and arrived at the stage of those who seek vengeance and who nurse inveterate hatred.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
